signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Blockers with this ability defend against swim/club pass rush moves as if they had an additional resistance point
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Passers with this ability have increased throw power on bullet precision passes (except on high/low throws).
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all throws outside the numbers (except on high/low throws).
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on any high point throws under 20 yards.
Defenders with this ability are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves (and cannot be faked out when user-controlled).
Defenders with this ability allow fewer broken tackles and cause more fumbles when cut-sticking ballcarriers.
Defenders with this ability force more catch knockouts and react quicker in any flat zone coverage, less than 10 yards from the LoS and outside the hash marks.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
When lined up in the slot, receivers with this ability make faster cuts and have better hands when catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 20+ yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move.
Blockers with this ability will allow less frequent shed attempts by their block target
Players with this ability can detect user-controlled defenders before the snap; as well as 3rd and 4th down blitzers. Can be bluffed.
Defenders with this ability are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves (and cannot be faked out when user-controlled).
Defenders with this ability will clear a ballcarrier's progress towards entering the zone with a hit-stick tackle.
Defenders with this ability will start 3rd or 4th down with increased fatigue replenishment
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while run blocking.
